label: Numbers station
description: The SCR-09 CH 12 number station — a woman counting, then silence, nightly. Automated and unexplained (GDD XIII 'automated and unknown signals'). It never changes and never dies; it simply reads FAINT by day and comes in clear at night. Ambiguity is the point — the game never says what it is for.

messages.live: A woman's voice, flat and unhurried, reading a string of numbers into the dark — nine, four, seven, one, seven... a long pause... and then, without inflection, she begins again.

notes: signalType=unknown, no anomaly ⇒ the engine reads it FAINT by day / LIVE at night (phase). No dead message — it never goes silent. Protect the ambiguity (GDD 'never explain everything').
